revision.comment: New Wikidata property for Colon Classification
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = vevent | bodystyle = width:{{{width|auto}}};padding-top:0; | aboveclass = summary | abovestyle = font-size:120%;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0.4em;border-bottom:1px solid #aaa; | above = [[Library catalog]]ing
and [[Library classification|classification]] | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{imagesize|}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}}} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | labelstyle = vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:0.5em;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.75em; | datastyle = font-size:110%;padding-right:0.45em; | label1 = main topic | data1 = {{#invoke:Wikidata|getValue|P301|FETCH_WIKIDATA}} | label2= [[Bliss classification|Bliss]] | data2 = {{{BC|}}} | label3= [[Colon classification|Colon]] | data3 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P8248|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{CC|}}}}} | label4 = [[Dewey Decimal Classification|Dewey Decimal]] | data4 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P1036|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{DDC|}}}}} | label5 = [[Library of Congress Classification|Library of Congress]] | data5 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P1149|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{LCC|}}}}} | label6 = [[Universal Decimal Classification|Universal Decimal]] | data6 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P1190|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{UDC|}}}}} }}{{Documentation}}

{{Infobox | bodyclass = vevent | bodystyle = width:{{{width|auto}}};padding-top:0; | aboveclass = summary | abovestyle = font-size:120%;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0.4em;border-bottom:1px solid #aaa; | above = [[Library catalog]]ing
and [[Library classification|classification]] | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage|image={{{logo|}}}|size={{{imagesize|}}}|alt={{{alt|}}}}} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | labelstyle = vertical-align:bottom;padding-left:0.5em;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;padding-right:0.75em; | datastyle = font-size:110%;padding-right:0.45em; | label1 = main topic | data1 = {{#invoke:Wikidata|getValue|P301|FETCH_WIKIDATA}} | label2= [[Bliss classification|Bliss]] | data2 = {{{BC|}}} | label3= [[Colon classification|Colon]] | data3 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P8248|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{CC|}}}}} | label4 = [[Dewey Decimal Classification|Dewey Decimal]] | data4 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P1036|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{DDC|}}}}} | label5 = [[Library of Congress Classification|Library of Congress]] | data5 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P1149|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{LCC|}}}}} | label6 = [[Universal Decimal Classification|Universal Decimal]] | data6 = {{#invoke:WikidataIB|getValue|P1190|qid={{#invoke:WikidataIB|getQid}}|osd=no|fwd=ALL|{{{UDC|}}}}} }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = vevent | bodystyle = width:{{{width|auto}}};padding-top:0; | aboveclass = summary | abovestyle = font-size:120%;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0.4em;border-bottom:1px solid #aaa; | above = [[Library catalog]]ing

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = vevent | bodystyle = width:{{{width|auto}}};padding-top:0; | aboveclass = summary | abovestyle = font-size:120%;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0.4em;border-bottom:1px solid #aaa; | above = [[Library catalog]]ing

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = vevent | bodystyle = width:{{{width|auto}}};padding-top:0; | aboveclass = summary | abovestyle = font-size:120%;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0.4em;border-bottom:1px solid #aaa; | above = [[Library catalog]]ing

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23460549766|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox | bodyclass = vevent | bodystyle = width:{{{width|auto}}};padding-top:0; | aboveclass = summary | abovestyle = font-size:120%;padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0.4em;border-bottom:1px solid #aaa; | above = [[Library catalog]]ing
